validation_outcome.clean_full_build: exit 0; SSW, BattleSim, and all three test runners built with -std=c++17
validation_outcome.std_c++17_pin: present in a sample pure-module compile line and confirmed inline everywhere
validation_outcome.tactical_wx_flags: derived from wx-config via common.mk WX_CXXFLAGS; hardcoded gtk3-unicode-static-3.3 path removed from src/tactical/Makefile
validation_outcome.pure_modules_wx_free: src/{core,strategic,ships,weapons,defenses}/Makefile contain no wx-config and no WX_CXXFLAGS; make -n compile line has zero wx-config invocations
validation_outcome.drift_fixes: malformed 'rm  -f*.gcov' and stale '-I../../../src/include' both removed from the tree
validation_outcome.coverage_opt_in: make -n COVERAGE=1 and full make COVERAGE=1 tests both add -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage
validation_outcome.strict_std_stop_constraint: not triggered; strict -std=c++17 compiled cleanly with no gnu++17 fallback

approved_deviation: src/tactical obtains wx include flags from wx-config via shared common.mk WX_CXXFLAGS — a user-approved deviation from the current AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md no-wx-config-in-the-six-modules rule; the carve-out is handled by this subtask's Documenter stage. The five pure modules remain strictly wx-free.
notes: Behavior-preserving build-config change. No C++ source/header, vs2022, or repo-root Makefile touched. No new tests expected.
